# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /inventory
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: user-service
    config:
      minute: 100
      policy: local

  - name: key-auth
    service: order-service

  - name: cors
    service: inventory-service
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Custom-Header
      credentials: true
